assertion_results.text: Each task file contains all required template sections: Repository, Description, at least one of Files to Modify or Files to Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 task files contain every required section. Task 1 has Repository (line 1), Description (line 4), Files to Modify (line 8), Files to Create (line 11), Implementation Notes (line 14), Acceptance Criteria (line 23), Test Requirements (line 30). Task 2 has Repository, Description, Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements. Task 3 has all sections plus Files to Create. Task 4 has all sections including both Files to Modify and Files to Create. Task 5 has Repository, Description, Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements. Task 6 has Repository, Description, Files to Create, Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements.

assertion_results.text: Task count is between 3 and 10 inclusive
assertion_results.evidence: There are exactly 6 task files: task-1-advisory-summary-model.md, task-2-aggregation-service.md, task-3-endpoint.md, task-4-threshold-filter.md, task-5-cache-invalidation.md, task-6-integration-tests.md.

All 6 task files contain '## Repository\ntrustify-backend' as their first section. Verified in task-1 (line 1-2), task-2 (line 1-2), task-3 (line 1-2), task-4 (line 1-2), task-5 (line 1-2), task-6 (line 1-2).

assertion_results.text: Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: Dependency chain: Task 1 has no dependencies. Task 2 depends on Task 1 ('Depends on: Task 1 — Advisory summary model'). Task 3 depends on Task 2 ('Depends on: Task 2 — Aggregation service'). Task 4 depends on Task 3 ('Depends on: Task 3 — Endpoint'). Task 5 depends on Task 3 ('Depends on: Task 3 — Endpoint'). Task 6 depends on Task 4 ('Depends on: Task 4 — Threshold filter'). This forms a valid DAG: 1->2->3->{4->6, 5} with no cycles.

assertion_results.text: Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths plausible within the repo-backend.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: All Files to Modify paths exist in repo-backend.md: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (line 41), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (line 46), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (line 48), modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (line 83), modules/ingestor/src/service/mod.rs (line 85), tests/Cargo.toml (line 114). All Files to Create are new files placed under existing directories from the manifest: severity_summary.rs under modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/ (exists at line 41-43), advisory_summary.rs under modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/ (exists at line 48-50), severity_threshold.rs under modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/, tests/api/advisory_summary.rs under tests/api/ (exists at line 110-113).

assertion_results.text: Impact map lists concrete, specific changes (not vague or abstract descriptions)
assertion_results.evidence: The impact-map.md contains 6 specific changes: (1) 'Add AdvisorySeveritySummary response model struct with fields for critical, high, medium, low, and total counts', (2) 'Extend SbomService with an aggregation method that queries the sbom_advisory join table grouped by severity', (3) 'Add GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}/advisory-summary endpoint with 5-minute cache configuration', (4) 'Add optional ?threshold query parameter to filter severity counts above a given level', (5) 'Update advisory ingestion in the ingestor module to invalidate cached advisory summaries when new advisories are linked to an SBOM', (6) 'Add integration tests for the new endpoint covering success, 404, caching, and threshold filtering'. Each specifies concrete struct names, endpoints, fields, or behaviors.

assertion_results.evidence: All 6 tasks contain exactly '## Repository\ntrustify-backend' with a single repository name. No task lists multiple repositories. Verified by reading lines 1-2 of each task file.
